locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: Dry Pipe sprinkler system, 20 years old, manufactured by Reliable, NFPA 13 Compliant
6 control valves inspected; all in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: adequate supply
Water supply: Static Pressure 42 psi, Residual Pressure 49 psi, Flow 1029 GPM, Supply Adequate
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room
Tamper switches not all connected on control valves

recommendations.description: Remove combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors to maintain required clearance.
Repair exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in main electrical room to comply with electrical code.

overall_assessment.summary: Dry pipe sprinkler system tested operational with adequate water supply; overall system status PASS despite Below Average risk grade due to identified deficiencies including combustible storage clearance and electrical code issues.
